title: Node-specific Volume Limits — Preventing Pod placement without CSI driver
text:
If
VolumeLimitScaling
feature gate
is enabled and a CSI driver has corresponding
CSIDriver
object installed with
spec.preventPodSchedulingIfMissing
set to true then scheduler will prevent pod placement to nodes that do not yet have CSI driver installed. For example:
apiVersion
:
storage.k8s.io/v1
kind
:
CSIDriver
metadata
:
name
:
hostpath.csi.k8s.io
spec
:
preventPodSchedulingIfMissing
:
true
This limitation only applies to pods that require corresponding CSI volume.
